What is a Set?

Each card has four attributes: color, shape, fill, and count. Three cards form a Set when, for each attribute, the values across the three cards are either all the same or all different.

Color — red · green · purple
must be all the same or all different
Shape — diamond · oval · squiggle
must be all the same or all different
Fill — solid · striped · empty
must be all the same or all different
Count — 1 · 2 · 3 symbols
must be all the same or all different

✓ Valid: 1 red solid diamond · 2 green striped ovals · 3 purple empty squiggles
(all different on every attribute)

✗ Not a Set: 1 red solid diamond · 2 red solid ovals · 3 red striped squiggles
(fill has two solid, one striped — neither all same nor all different)
